example: She organized her collection of novels neatly on the bookshelf in the living room.
She drew the curtains to block out the sunlight streaming into the room.
She reached for a tissue to wipe away her tears.
He reached for a napkin to wipe his hands after enjoying the barbecue ribs.
She squeezed a small amount of toothpaste onto her toothbrush before brushing her teeth.
He used a safety razor to shave his beard every morning.
He replaced the burnt-out light bulb in the ceiling fixture with a new one.
She pressed the switch to turn on the light in the room.
He plugged his phone charger into the outlet to charge his phone.
She used a pair of scissors to cut out shapes from construction paper for her art project.
She stepped into the warm shower, letting the water soothe her tired muscles after a long day.
The toilet in the modern bathroom featured sleek design and water-efficient technology.
She filled the sink with warm, soapy water to wash the dirty dishes.
She soaked in the bathtub with bubbles and candles for a relaxing evening.
He used a towel to dry his hair after swimming.
He adjusted his tie while gazing into the mirror above the dresser.
She reached into her purse to retrieve the key to the front door.
He turned the key in the lock to secure the front door before leaving.
The gutter along the roofline prevented rainwater from dripping onto the walkway below.
She fluffed up the cushions on the sofa for added comfort.
